title: Ridge Suture Litany
text: The ridge starts to peel apart, but the old bolting line can still be stitched if someone reaches it in time.
flavor: Every prayer on the suture posts was written by a worker who expected not to come back down.
resolutionSummary: Walked the Ridge Suture Litany, sealed the worst fracture, and cooled the operative under pressure.

effects.text: Ridge suture anchored. The watch posts can still hold for one more convoy.
